text: Final totality gap fixed: checked CSR rejects row-pointer overflow at Int.MaxValue rows and checked CSC rejects column-pointer overflow at Int.MaxValue columns before allocation; the opposite maximum dimension remains valid for empty matrices through transpose-based CSC construction. Focused tests pass 7/7 on JVM and Scala.js. Final post-fix gate: 450 JVM core, 447 Scala.js core, 30 JVM laws, 30 Scala.js laws, both full JS links, benchmark compile, and clean JVM/JS API docs.
